title: rubus hirtus var. prehensibilis
intro: Rubus hirtus var. prehensibilis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wild raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. prehensibilis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of colds and flu.
